data.name: VR Paradise - Steam Edition
data.detailed_description:
VR Paradise is a virtual Strip Club for educated grown-ups who own a VR headset.
It has been created by a French independent studio, specializing in game and software development for over 20 years.

The goal was to create the most immersive and arousing strip club experience.

The game’s high-quality and life-like result was achieved by using motion-capture on some of the most talented and professional strippers and applying high poly real-time meshes and ultra-realistic textures afterward.
Just like in a real strip club, enjoy the simultaneous pole-dance shows onstage, table dances, and explicitly nude private dances, all on demand.

You can also go into the locker room and customize any of the strippers:

  • Their hair cut
  • Their eye, hair, and skin color.
  • Their breast and bottom size.
  • Their outfits.
  • Add multiple accessories (earrings, glasses, garter...etc.)
  • Add tattoos. "

data.short_description: VR Paradise is a virtual Strip Club for educated grown ups who own a VR headset.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 480 or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 50 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7–7700 / AMD Ryzen 7 2700X or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 / AMD Radeon RX 580 or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 50 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: VR Paradise uses Unreal® Engine. Unreal® is a trademark or registered trademark of Epic Games, Inc. in the United States of America and elsewhere. Unreal® Engine, Copyright 1998 – 2020, Epic Games, Inc. All rights reserved.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel i5-4590 / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 480 or greater
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 50 GB available space
  • VR Support: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7–7700 / AMD Ryzen 7 2700X or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1080 / AMD Radeon RX 580 or greater
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 50 GB available space
